positive: A whimsical and cheerful illustration of three diverse woodland animals—a fox, a badger, and a rabbit—having a picnic in a sunny meadow, rendered in a soft storybook style, gouache paint texture, highly inviting and cute.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, scary, aggressive, hyperrealistic, muddy colors
